ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the temperature projection */,
  "rcp26" REAL /* Temperature change projection under RCP26 scenario */,
  "rcp45" REAL /* Temperature change projection under RCP45 scenario */,
  "rcp60" REAL /* Temperature change projection under RCP60 scenario */,
  "rcp85" REAL /* Temperature change projection under RCP85 scenario */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES climate_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rcp_scenarios" (
  "rcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RCP scenario */,
  "rcp_name" TEXT /* Name of the RCP scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario including its targets for greenhouse gas concentration */,
  "target_concentration" REAL /* Target greenhouse gas concentration for the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection or projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., analyst, modeler) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., climate model) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source and its methodology */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate model and its methodology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the climate model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking updates */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Details about the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_roles" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_roles_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data access, model update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
